## Objective

"okay those changes work. now let's add a user profile on the top right of the home page like the screenshot (ss) Ii attached. the button should be circular and once a user clicks it t should redirect the user to their profile. there a user can update their name, change their passowrd, add a phone number and add a profile picture. the profile picture the user uploads should be used as the icon for the circular profile button (use a default user icon when the user first creates a account). regarding the phone number the user adds in the user profile, when the system prompts the user to add a phone number (for example in the inquiry page), auto fill the number if the user already added it in the profile (kust auto fill it, don't hard code it into the relevant text box; let the user change the number on the relevant text box if they want to)."
